name: UV Protection Sunglasses
description: Shield your eyes in style with our premium UV400 protection sunglasses. Featuring polarized lenses that eliminate glare from water and sand, a lightweight TR90 frame, and 100% UVA/UVB protection. Perfect for beach days, outdoor sports, and everyday summer adventures.

name: Tropical Print Swim Shorts
description: Dive into summer with these vibrant tropical print swim shorts. Made from quick-dry recycled polyester fabric, they feature a comfortable elastic waistband with drawstring, mesh lining for support, and a secure side pocket. Available in bold patterns that turn heads on the beach.

name: SPF 50 Sunscreen Spray
description: Protect your skin without the greasy feel. Our lightweight SPF 50 mineral sunscreen spray goes on clear, is water-resistant for up to 80 minutes, and is reef-safe. Formulated with antioxidants and hyaluronic acid to keep your skin hydrated while providing broad-spectrum protection.

name: Premium Beach Tote Bag
description: The ultimate beach companion. This spacious tote bag features a sand-resistant interior, waterproof outer coating, multiple organizational pockets, and comfortable padded shoulder straps. Large enough to carry towels, sunscreen, snacks, and all your beach essentials in style.

name: Inflatable Pool Float Ring
description: Float the day away with our oversized inflatable pool ring. Made from premium thick PVC with reinforced air chambers, this fun float is 150cm in diameter and features a fun flamingo design. Includes a repair patch kit and comes in a compact carry bag for easy storage and transport.

name: Breezy Linen Summer Dress
description: Effortlessly chic and blissfully comfortable, this flowing linen summer dress is your go-to for beach-to-brunch transitions. Features an adjustable tie waist, flowy midi length, square neckline, and ruffled hemline. Made from 100% breathable linen that keeps you cool all day long.

name: Waterproof Bluetooth Speaker
description: Bring the party to the beach with this rugged IPX7 waterproof Bluetooth speaker. With 360° surround sound, 24-hour battery life, and a built-in power bank to charge your devices, it's the perfect summer audio companion. Drop-proof, sand-proof, and ready for any adventure.

name: Aloe Vera After-Sun Gel
description: Soothe and restore sun-exposed skin with our cooling aloe vera after-sun gel. Formulated with 99% pure aloe vera extract, vitamin E, and green tea antioxidants to calm irritation, reduce redness, and deeply hydrate. Absorbs instantly without stickiness for immediate relief.
